note: Support coin kit. Skill1: fires every 8 full-charge attacks (SR = 1 hit/pull, so hitCount 8, not the parser's every-shot) -> team burst CDR 7s; its Max-HP grant is skipped (defensive, no restore). Skill2 coin chain: only the Sword Coin Attack Damage 6.65% is offensive -> modeled as a permanent all-ally buff ('self and 2 allies on both sides' in a 5-slot squad = whole team). Shield Coin (Damage Taken down) and Double Sword Coin (Max HP up) are defensive and skipped. Burst slot omitted: the parser already emits the ATK 15.07%-of-caster team buff faithfully; the three coin-gated Max-HP grants are defensive and correctly dropped. TIER AUDIT: her Max-HP grants feed HP-scaling carries (Cinderella's 2.71%-of-MaxHP ATK — the Rouge+Cindy synergy) via the new casterMaxHpPct stat. Burst: team casterAtk 15.07 + Max HP grant time-averaged across coin progression (10.15 Sword / 20.1 Shield@30FC / 30.02 DoubleSword@5casts -> ~22 avg per 10s cast). S2's permanent Double-Sword 15.08% (from ~t=100s -> avg 7.5) added as passive. Inert for teammates without atkOfMaxHpPct. REBUILD 2026-07-13 (run-E videos e/e2): cinderella's +18% between slot-orders proved rouge's kit is positional and her Max-HP grants are OFFENSIVE for HP-scaled-ATK units (cindy's ATK = % of her live Max HP; engine feeds maxHpFlat into atkOfMaxHpPct live). Changes: (1) Sword Coin 6.65 Attack Damage now selfAndAdjacent(2 per side) — the kit's 'self and 2 allies on both sides'; (2) burst Max-HP grant modeled: all allies casterMaxHpPct 22.5 ⚑ for 10s per cast (fight-average of the coin-tier ladder 10.15 Sword / 20.1 Shield / 30.02 Double, weighted by tier timeline: Shield ~30 full charges ~55s, Double ~5 bursts ~75s); (3) Double Sword Coin permanent 15.08% to coin holders -> positional casterMaxHpPct 8.7 ⚑ (15.08 x ~58% fight uptime); (4) S1's team Max HP 5% per 8 full charges at ~45% uptime -> passive 2.3 ⚑. All ⚑ values are timeline averages of exact kit numbers, not fits.
